query: Find 10 parcels in Stavanger municipality that are located in agricultural land, sorted by teigid ascending.

1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: get distinct AR50 category values for candidate columns within Stavanger extent (will use bbox from step 1)

3.description: get teig parcels for Stavanger (select id and geometry; will filter by kommunenummer or spatially later)

4.description: intersect teig parcels with agricultural AR50 polygons to identify parcels in agricultural land

5.description: select distinct teig id for final output

6.description: sort teig ids ascending by teig id

executions.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Stavanger%' LIMIT 1;

SELECT ogc_fid, artype, arjordbr, areal, ST_AsText(wkb_geometry) AS geom_wkt FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50" WHERE ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, ST_Envelope(ST_GeomFromText((SELECT ST_AsText(omrade) FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer = '1103'), 25833))) LIMIT 1;
